Based on the evidence, Frederick is the most likely murderer. He had a strong motive (protecting his daughter from Marvin's threats), direct access to the murder weapon (a machete from his own collection), and was confirmed to be at the scene (security tapes showed him arguing with Marvin). Justin had a motive (romantic rejection) but no access to the weapon and a solid alibi (he was in the crowd during the game and did not leave). The murder weapon being from Frederick's collection is particularly damning.

Action: Finish[1]
